name: Artrutx Sea Club
description: A sea club beside the Cap d'Artrutx lighthouse: restaurant and cocktail bar facing the sea, with one of the west's finest sunsets.

practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; opening hours change each season — check the venue's website or Instagram.

planner.shuttleInfo: Drive from Ciutadella (~8-10 km south, 15-20 min). Restaurant's private car park and roadside parking (fills up early in summer: arrive ahead of time).
planner.effortNote: Flat terrace next to the Cap d'Artrutx lighthouse.
